examples: I would like a beefburger, please.
In order to make the point in a dramatic way, Britain's Agriculture, Fisheries and Food Minister John Gummer decided to feed his four-year-old daughter Cordelia a beefburger in front of the cameras.
But should people be surprised at all these extra ingredients cropping up in a beefburger?
Earlier, the FSA said two beefburger products withdrawn from sale over concerns they may contain horsemeat had tested positive.
In one sample from a Tesco beefburger, horsemeat accounted for approximately 29% of the meat content, the FSAI said.
